scripts.mcp-server:bundle: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C mcp-server bundle
scripts.mcp-server:test: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C mcp-server test
scripts.mcp-server:format: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C mcp-server format
scripts.test-fixtures:format: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C packages/doughnut-test-fixtures format
scripts.test-fixtures:lint: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C packages/doughnut-test-fixtures lint
scripts.cli: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && DOUGHNUT_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9081 DOUGHNUT_CONFIG_DIR=$HOME/.config/doughnut-dev pnpm -C cli exec tsx src/index.ts
scripts.cli:bundle: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C cli bundle
scripts.cli:format: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C cli format
scripts.cli:lint: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C cli lint
scripts.cli:test: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C cli test
scripts.frontend:build: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend build
scripts.frontend:format: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend format
scripts.frontend:lint: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend lint
scripts.frontend:test:ui: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend test:ui
scripts.frontend:test: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend test
scripts.frontend:test:watch: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend test:watch
scripts.frontend:sut: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend dev
scripts.frontend:storybook: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm -C frontend storybook
scripts.backend:test: pnpm backend:format && (backend/gradlew -p backend migrateTestDB -Dspring.profiles.active=test || (echo 'Migration failed! 💀' && exit 1)) && pnpm backend:test_only
scripts.generateTypeScript: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent install && pnpm backend:generateOpenAPIDocs && pnpm openAPIToTypeScript && node scripts/add-generated-package-json.mjs
scripts.cy:run-with-sut: wait-on tcp:5174 http://127.0.0.1:5173/__lb__/ready && cypress run --config-file e2e_test/config/ci.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm cli:bundle && pnpm frontend:build && pnpm exec run-p -clnr backend:sut start:mb local:lb cy:run-on-sut
scripts.sut: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm cli:bundle && node scripts/sut-start.mjs
scripts.lint:all: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm backend:lint && pnpm frontend:lint && pnpm cli:lint && pnpm test-fixtures:lint && pnpm cy:lint && pnpm test:path-routing && pnpm test:sut-healthcheck && pnpm test:sut-restart && pnpm test:sut-start && pnpm validate:path-routing && pnpm openapi:lint
scripts.format:all: pnpm --frozen-lockfile --silent recursive install && pnpm backend:format && pnpm frontend:format && pnpm mcp-server:format && pnpm test-fixtures:format && pnpm cli:format && pnpm cy:format && pnpm openapi:lint
scripts.bundle:all: pnpm mcp-server:bundle && pnpm cli:bundle && pnpm frontend:build
